style_effects: Subtle steam curls rise from Clefairy's metallic joints, reflecting distorted cityscapes in its polished armor. Glowing blue energy pulses rhythmically along its seam lines, casting sharp blue-white light that fractures into prismatic shards. Metallic dust particles drift in slow motion, catching the cold luminescence of its aura. Clean cel-shaded Pokémon illustration style with bold outlines and soft shading.
